heading: Palantir
subheading: Beautiful, intuitive dashboards tailored to your KPIs — sales, finance, operations, marketing, or forecasting.
content:
### Custom Power BI Dashboards

Beautiful, intuitive dashboards tailored to your KPIs — sales, finance, operations, marketing, or forecasting.

Data Integration

Connect multiple sources including databases, APIs, Excel, cloud platforms, and SaaS tools into a single analytics layer.

Data Modeling & Transformation

Clean, structure, and optimize your data using best-practice modeling techniques for fast and reliable reporting.

Advanced Analytics

Implement \*\*DAX \*\*calculations, trend analysis, forecasting, and performance metrics for deeper business intelligence.

Real-Time Reporting

Monitor live data with auto-refresh dashboards so you always stay ahead.

Secure Sharing & Access Control

Role-based access ensures the right people see the right data — across desktop and mobile.
homePageDescription: Beautiful, intuitive dashboards tailored to your KPIs — sales, finance, operations, marketing, or forecasting.
